page_content:
Restriction: Must be admitted to AGNR Honors Program.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

NFSC398 Seminar (1 Credit)

Presentation and discussion of current literature and research in food science.

Formerly: FDSC398.

NFSC399 Special Problems in Food Science (1-3 Credits) Designed for advanced undergraduates. Specific problems in food science will be assigned.
